_note: Blank schema for a projected-cost estimate for a future project or proposal. Real estimates live in pipeline/finance/<estimate_id>.local.json (gitignored). Every line item carries its source (quote | cost_library | cost_research | assumption) and, when sourced, a citation; assumptions are labeled and never presented as quotes. is_capex classification is organizational, not a tax determination (see _boundary). Time cost uses the personal rate card's effective_hourly when present, else a labeled assumption. Totals are computed by tools/finance.py cost_rollup, never by the model.
_boundary: ARITHMETIC AND RESEARCH NOTES. NOT TAX, ACCOUNTING, OR INVESTMENT ADVICE. REVIEW WITH A CPA OR TAX PROFESSIONAL BEFORE FILING OR RELYING ON CATEGORIZATIONS.

line_items.category: production_materials | equipment_capex | software_subscriptions | contractor_labor | travel | shipping_and_fees
